visa_types.name: Single Entry Visa For Destination Group Tour For Indonesian Citizens (Organized By Travel Agent Designated)
visa_types.processing_time:
The time required for the visa application process until issuance varies depending on the jurisdiction in which the application is filed. Assuming there are no issues with the required documents, visa application, etc., typically takes a minimum of
Bali Application Centre
- 5 business days from the day the application is received
Jakarta, Medan, Surabaya & Makassar Application Centre
- 6 business days from the day the application is received
However, if the number of applications is very high or if further checks are necessary, the process may take longer. Additionally, if there are doubts regarding the visa application, documents, etc., or if a thorough inspection by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs (Tokyo) is required, the visa issuance may take more than 1 month.
Therefore, it is advised to submit your application well in advance.
Furthermore, we do not recommend purchasing ticket/s before your visa is approved (except for transit visas, which require a purchased/fixed ticket).
If a ticket expire before the visa is issued, it is not the responsibility of the Japan Embassy or VFS Global Japan Visa Application Center.
visa_types.forms:
Application Form 
Guarantee Letter 
Invitation Letter 
Itinerary 

Multiple entry visa for tourism

Multiple entry visa for business
visa_types.overview:
Overview
To further enhance the friendly relations between Japan and Indonesia, starting from 20 November 2014, Indonesian citizens visiting Japan for Group Tour purposes organized by local Travel Agent who have been appointed by the Embassy of Japan / Japan Consulate Office in Indonesia (hereinafter referred to as Travel Designated Agent), may apply for a short visit VISA for single entry with document requirements relief. With the enforcement of this system, VISA applicants no longer need to attach documents showing economic capacity (financial evidence).
                                                                    
Documents Required
Get the peace of mind you need on your travels, with insurance made simple for more click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/idn/en/jpn/travel-insurance-non-schengen).
Please contact Japan Visa Application Center for more information.
** Important Notice; As instructed by the Embassy of Japan,
- All submitted documents
 
must not be stapled.
- All submitted documents
 
must be printed on an A4 paper
- Please make sure your photos are glued firmly.
- All submitted documents must be neatly
, not folded or bent.
Note:
- The service fee is inclusive of all applicable taxes.
- VFS service fee is non-refundable.
- Visa fee is refunded only if visa is not approved by the embassy or if visa application is withdrawn by applicant.
Refund of Visa Fee: Visa fee refunds will be processed within 14 working days from the date we receive a duly filled and signed Refund Request Form from the applicant/payee.
It's important to make sure that the correct bank account details are provided on Refund Request Form to avoid delays in processing.
For further clarifications, please contact the Japan Visa Application Centre or Japan Helpline
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
To further enhance the friendly relations between Japan and Indonesia, starting from 20 November 2014, Indonesian citizens visiting Japan for Group Tour purposes organized by local Travel Agent who have been appointed by the Embassy of Japan / Japan Consulate Office in Indonesia (hereinafter referred to as Travel Designated Agent), may apply for a short visit VISA for single entry with document requirements relief. With the enforcement of this system, VISA applicants no longer need to attach documents showing economic capacity (financial evidence).
                                                                    
Documents Required
Get the peace of mind you need on your travels, with insurance made simple for more click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/idn/en/jpn/travel-insurance-non-schengen).
Please contact Japan Visa Application Center for more information.
** Important Notice; As instructed by the Embassy of Japan,
- All submitted documents
 
must not be stapled.
- All submitted documents
 
must be printed on an A4 paper
- Please make sure your photos are glued firmly.
- All submitted documents must be neatly
, not folded or bent.
Note:
- The service fee is inclusive of all applicable taxes.
- VFS service fee is non-refundable.
- Visa fee is refunded only if visa is not approved by the embassy or if visa application is withdrawn by applicant.
Refund of Visa Fee: Visa fee refunds will be processed within 14 working days from the date we receive a duly filled and signed Refund Request Form from the applicant/payee.
It's important to make sure that the correct bank account details are provided on Refund Request Form to avoid delays in processing.
For further clarifications, please contact the Japan Visa Application Centre or Japan Helpline

## Photo Specifications
Please submit one photograph along with your visa  application. The photograph must be:
- Must not be taken more than 6 months before  application time
- 45 mm x 35 mm
- Color photo with plain background
- Taken looking straight forward and face  seen clearly 

Please do not use any textured paper to print the photo
Please note the Embassy may request for a new photo if it does  not meet the specifications. 

## Processing Time
The time required for the visa application process until issuance varies depending on the jurisdiction in which the application is filed. Assuming there are no issues with the required documents, visa application, etc., typically takes a minimum of
Bali Application Centre
- 5 business days from the day the application is received
Jakarta, Medan, Surabaya & Makassar Application Centre
- 6 business days from the day the application is received
However, if the number of applications is very high or if further checks are necessary, the process may take longer. Additionally, if there are doubts regarding the visa application, documents, etc., or if a thorough inspection by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs (Tokyo) is required, the visa issuance may take more than 1 month.
Therefore, it is advised to submit your application well in advance.
Furthermore, we do not recommend purchasing ticket/s before your visa is approved (except for transit visas, which require a purchased/fixed ticket).
If a ticket expire before the visa is issued, it is not the responsibility of the Japan Embassy or VFS Global Japan Visa Application Center.

## Download Forms

Application Form 
Guarantee Letter 
Invitation Letter 
Itinerary 

Multiple entry visa for tourism

Multiple entry visa for business

visa_types.name: Pre-registration Visa Waiver For Ic/electronic Passport Holders
visa_types.overview:
Indonesia national with IC passport holder with registration will be waived for visa up to 15 days stay in Japan.
Click here for more information.
Document Requirement for Visa Waiver
Visa Waiver Form
Each applicant should also pay for a service fee of IDR 195,000 (including 11% VAT) for pre-registration of visa waiver for IC/electronic passport holder at Japan Visa Application Centre in Indonesia.
Visa Processing Time
The time required for the visa application process until issuance, varies depending on the jurisdiction in which the application is filed. Aassuming there are no issues with the required documents, visa application, etc., typically takes a minimum of
Bali & Surabaya Application Centre
- 3 business days from the day the application is received
Jakarta, Medan & Makassar Application Centre
- 6 business days from the day the application is received
However, if the number of applications is very high or if further checks are necessary, the process may take longer. Additionally, if there are doubts regarding the visa application, documents, etc., or if a thorough inspection by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs (Tokyo) is required, the visa issuance may take more than 1 month.
Therefore, it is advised to submit your application well in advance.
Furthermore, we do not recommend purchasing ticket/s before your visa is approved (except for transit visas, which require a purchased/fixed ticket).
If a ticket expire before the visa is issued, it is not the responsibility of the Japan Embassy or VFS Global Japan Visa Application Center.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visiting for: Studying, School enrolment, Training, Family stay, entertainment over 90days stay, or paid business.
Please note that the Japan Visa Application Centre (JVAC) only accepts applicant with the following jurisdiction (based on ID Card (KTP);
                                                                    
Japan Visa Application Centre in Jakarta: 
Jakarta, Banten, Jawa Barat, Jawa Tengah, Yogyakarta, Kalimantan Tengah, Kalimantan Barat, Sumatera Selatan, Bangka Belitung, Bengkulu, Lampung
Japan Visa Application Centre in Surabaya: 
Jawa Timur, Kalimantan Timur, Kalimantan Utara, Kalimantan Selatan
Japan Visa Application Centre in Makassar: 
Sulawesi Utara, Gorontalo, Sulawesi Tengah, Sulawesi Tenggara, Sulawesi Selatan, Sulawesi Barat, Maluku Utara, Maluku, Papua (Irian Jaya), Papua Barat
Japan Visa Application Centre in Bali: 
Bali, Nusa Tenggara Barat, Nusa Tenggara Timur
Japan Visa Application Centre in Medan:
Aceh Nangroe Darusalam, Sumatera Utara, Sumatera Barat, Jambi, Riau, Kepulauan Riau

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visa for visiting families and relatives, visiting friends and acquaintances, holiday, visit family member of Japanese living in Indonesia and business purposes (not getting any reward/pay). You can stay up to 90 days using this visa type.
Please note that the Japan Visa Application Centre (JVAC) only accepts Customer with the following jurisdiction (based on ID Card (KTP);
Japan Visa Application Centre in Jakarta: 
Jakarta, Banten, Jawa Barat, Jawa Tengah, Yogyakarta, Kalimantan Tengah, Kalimantan Barat, Sumatera Selatan, Bangka Belitung, Bengkulu, Lampung
Japan Visa Application Centre in Surabaya:

Japan Visa Application Centre in Medan:
Aceh Nangroe Darusalam, Sumatera Utara, Sumatera Barat, Jambi, Riau, Kepulauan Riau

- 6 business days from the day the application is received
However, if the number of applications is very high or if further checks are necessary, the process may take longer. Additionally, if there are doubts regarding the visa application, documents, etc., or if a thorough inspection by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs (Tokyo) is required, the visa issuance may take more than 1 month.
Therefore, it is advised to submit your application well in advance.
Furthermore, we do not recommend purchasing ticket/s before your visa is approved (except for transit visas, which require a purchased/fixed ticket).
If a ticket expire before the visa is issued, it is not the responsibility of the Japan Embassy or VFS Global Japan Visa Application Center.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Multiple visits of families and relatives, friends and acquaintances, Holiday up to 30 days. Multiple visits of Business up to 90 days per visit.
Please note that the Japan Visa Application Centre (JVAC) only accepts applicant with the following jurisdiction (based on ID Card (KTP);
Japan Visa Application Centre in Jakarta: 
Jakarta, Banten, Jawa Barat, Jawa Tengah, Yogyakarta, Kalimantan Tengah, Kalimantan Barat, Sumatera Selatan, Bangka Belitung, Bengkulu, Lampung
Japan Visa Application Centre in Surabaya:

Japan Visa Application Centre in Makassar: 
Sulawesi Utara, Gorontalo, Sulawesi Tengah, Sulawesi Tenggara, Sulawesi Selatan, Sulawesi Barat, Maluku Utara, Maluku, Papua (Irian Jaya), Papua Barat

Japan Visa Application Centre in Medan:
Aceh Nangroe Darusalam, Sumatera Utara, Sumatera Barat, Jambi, Riau, Kepulauan Riau

## Documents Required
Get the peace of mind you need on your travels, with insurance made simple for more click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/idn/en/jpn/travel-insurance-non-schengen).

## Photo Specifications
 Please submit one photograph along with your  visa application. The photograph must be:
- Must not be taken more than 6 months before application time
- 45 mm x 35 mm
- Color photo with plain background
- Taken looking straight forward and face seen clearly
Please note the Embassy may request for a new photo if it does not meet the specifications.
                                                                    

## Processing Time
The time required for the visa application process until issuance varies depending on the jurisdiction in which the application is filed. Assuming there are no issues with the required documents, visa application, etc., typically takes a minimum of
Bali Application Centre
- 5 business days from the day the application is received
Jakarta, Medan, Surabaya & Makassar Application Centre
- 6 business days from the day the application is received
However, if the number of applications is very high or if further checks are necessary, the process may take longer. Additionally, if there are doubts regarding the visa application, documents, etc., or if a thorough inspection by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs (Tokyo) is required, the visa issuance may take more than 1 month.
Therefore, it is advised to submit your application well in advance.
Furthermore, we do not recommend purchasing ticket/s before your visa is approved (except for transit visas, which require a purchased/fixed ticket).
If a ticket expire before the visa is issued, it is not the responsibility of the Japan Embassy or VFS Global Japan Visa Application Center.
